seo.title: Tuition & Scholarship | The Flame Christian Co-op
seo.description: Clear, transparent tuition with scholarship options through Step Up for Students.
seo.ogTitle: Tuition & Scholarship | The Flame Christian Co-op
seo.ogDescription: Clear, transparent tuition with scholarship options.

heroHeadline: An Investment in Faith, Formation, and Future.
heroLead: We know tuition is a meaningful decision for every family. Our goal is to make the process clear, transparent, and connected to the mission.
tableIntroBody: All fees are non-refundable. Tuition is paid in two equal installments. First-year totals include new-family fees: application, supply, registration, and background check.
tableFootnote: Tuition paid in two equal installments: Aug 15 (1st half) · Dec 3 (2nd half). Supply fee secures the child's spot — due within 3 business days of acceptance. Background fee due after handbook submission. All fees non-refundable. New-family fees apply to first-year enrollment only.

callouts.note: Existing Flame families only — no new-family fees

scholarshipsIntro: The Flame Christian Cooperative is a direct provider for the Step Up for Students Scholarship in Florida. We believe financial barriers should not stand between a family and the Christ-centered education God is calling them toward.
scholarshipsBody: Families can pay directly through the Step Up for Students Marketplace portal, or we provide all documentation for a reimbursement request. Your tuition agreement remains in place whether you use scholarship funds or pay out of pocket.

scholarships.name: Personalized Education Program (PEP)
scholarships.desc: Through the Florida Tax Credit Scholarship Program

scholarships.name: FES-UA Scholarship
scholarships.desc: Family Empowerment Scholarship for Students with Unique Abilities
